message:
chore: update audit index (batches 475-483) and sync beads issue tracker

audit_index.jsonl:
- Record batch 475 SapphireHill fresh-eyes audits: split, multipart,
  h1/client, dns/lookup, request_region, stealing, kqueue, read_line,
  crdt, websocket/client (all SOUND).
- Record GeminiCLI audits: io/copy, once_cell, io_driver, mpsc, pool,
  spawn_blocking, scenario, subject, unix/split, protocol/mod (all SOUND).
- Record batch 483 IvoryBarn: pool transition exposure, http_client IO
  release (both FIXED).
- Record batch 483 StormyBarn: scope.rs race_all panic precedence (FIXED).
- Record CyanCave: h2/frame.rs length assertion, h2/stream.rs active
  filter (FIXED + SOUND).
- Record BrownRidge: kafka.rs blocking spawn refactor (FIXED).
- Record GoldStream: bridge.rs/distributed_region.rs config validation
  (both FIXED), mysql.rs dead-store removal (SOUND).
- Record CobaltGlen: mpsc.rs clippy review (SOUND), session.rs type
  annotation cleanup (FIXED).
- Record GoldFinch: watch_stream.rs cancellation fix (FIXED).
- Record PinkFalcon: extractor.rs cycle detection (FIXED), harness.rs
  traced client (FIXED).
- Record WindyRidge: kafka_consumer.rs poll recheck (FIXED).
- Additional entries for scope.rs clippy fix and completed SapphireHill audits.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync beads state with completed and in-progress work items.
